subcodes.first_line: O steadfast one! Your letter of mid-Safar was received, and its contents indicated that mention of this Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ثابت پیمانا نامه نیمه صفر واصل گردید مضمون دلالت بر آن مینمود که ذکر این امر
subcodes.subjects: @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings
